reasoning: The control requires preventing non-privileged users from executing privileged functions and capturing such executions in audit logs. In Kubernetes, this can be achieved by ensuring that no non-privileged users have ClusterAdmin roles through RBAC configurations, enforcing least privilege principles, and enabling audit logging to capture privileged actions.
title: 3_1_7: 3.1.7 Prevent non-privileged users from executing privileged functions and capture the execution of such functions in audit logs
